hero.description: TiaJo Bank combines financial education, technology, and fun to transform the way students, teachers, and families learn and teach.

mini2.title: Safe and reliable
mini2.desc: We protect everyone's data and privacy.

mini3.title: Easy to use
mini3.desc: Designed to learn in a simple and intuitive way.

main.heading_subtitle: Powerful tools that turn financial learning into a unique experience.

more_box.title: Want to see more features?
more_box.desc: TiaJo Bank includes many more tools for students, teachers, parents, and schools.

lessons.title: Interactive lessons
lessons.desc: Learn financial concepts with short, dynamic lessons aligned with the school curriculum.

missions.title: Missions and challenges
missions.desc: Complete fun missions, earn rewards, and develop healthy financial habits.

games.title: Educational games
games.desc: Learn by playing with interactive activities that reinforce your financial knowledge.

savings.title: Savings and goals
savings.desc: Create savings goals, organize your money, and visualize your progress with simple charts.

reports.title: Reports and analytics
reports.desc: Teachers and schools can monitor progress in real time.

family.title: Family involvement
family.desc: Engage families with access to progress updates, recommendations, and home resources.

resources.title: Resources and activities
resources.desc: Guides, templates, printable activities, and ready-to-use materials.

security.title: Security and privacy
security.desc: Data protection for students, teachers, and families.

certifications.title: Certifications
certifications.desc: Recognize achievements and progress with digital certificates.

badges.title: Badges and levels
badges.desc: Motivate students with achievements, levels, and rewards.

teacher_panel.title: Teacher dashboard
teacher_panel.desc: Manage courses, review progress, and organize activities.

communication.title: School communication
communication.desc: Connect the educational community from a single place.
